issue_title: Output terminal isn't cleared when second to last frame is taller than terminal
issue_body_preview:
Hi,
As per description, I noticed that the terminal is correctly cleared if the last frame output is taller than the terminal window, however, if the last frame is shorter, the second to last frame isn't cleared. Here's a video to demonstrate this:

https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/15172
test_description_zh: 在终端窗口中运行 Ink 应用，使某一帧的输出内容高度超过终端窗口高度，然后让下一帧的输出内容变短（低于终端高度），观察终端中前一帧的内容是否被完全清除。
expected_result_zh: 当新一帧输出比前一帧更短时，终端应完全清除前一帧的内容，不会残留之前较高帧的多余行，屏幕上只显示当前帧的输出内容。
